title: Grave of the Forgotten
description:
There is a single grave with a [jitter][aqua]roiling blue flame[/aqua][/jitter]...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it [sine]begging[/sine] to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the [red]truth[/red]?

options.title: Confront with Truth
options.description: Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card that [gold]Exhausts[/gold] with [purple]Soul's Power[/purple].
options.requires: You have no cards with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that can be [purple]Enchanted[/purple].

conditions: All players must have at least one card that can be enchanted with Soul's Power
notes: The Confront option is locked if you lack any enchantable cards (cards with Exhaust that can receive the Soul's Power enchantment). When you confront the soul, it fights you—represented by the [aqua]SOUL FIGHT[/aqua] mentioned in the multi-page description—and you win despite your exhaustion. The Confront path adds a Decay curse to your deck as a cost but grants you the ability to enhance one of your Exhaust cards. The Accept path is risk-free and grants the Forgotten Soul relic, which the soul offers to accompany you loyally to your final destination.
